# OS Consultants

> Your Gateway to the World

OS Consultants is Pakistan's trusted visa and travel consultancy based in Blue Area, Islamabad. We offer premium visa consultancy for Schengen, UK, USA, Canada, and Australia, along with IATA-authorized ticketing, hotel booking, and travel insurance.

## Core Services
- Visa Applications (Tourist, Student, Work, Family Visit)
- Air Ticketing (IATA-authorized, worldwide flights)
- Hotel Booking
- Travel Insurance
- Passport Services

## Contact Information
- Address: Office # 3, Aaly Plaza, Fazal-e-Haq Road, Block E G 6/2 Blue Area, Islamabad, 44000
- Phone: +92 51 2021700
- WhatsApp: +92 336 5500477
- Email: info@osconsultants.pk
- Websites: https://ostravel.pk, https://ostravels.com

## Company Highlights
- 15+ Years of Experience
- 98% Visa Approval Rate
- 20K+ Happy Travelers served
- Dedicated Case Officers for every client
- Transparent pricing and fast processing times

## Destinations
We specialize in visas and travel arrangements for:
- Schengen Area (Europe)
- United States of America
- United Kingdom
- Canada
- Australia
- New Zealand
- Middle East
- And more worldwide destinations.
